query:
SELECT 
  planName,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
  ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(monthlyCost) = 0 THEN 100 
        ELSE (1 - SUM(monthlyCost)/SUM(monthlyRevenue)) * 100 END, 1) as marginPct
FROM services
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY planName;
